title: oenothera strigosa subsp. canovirens
intro: Oenothera strigosa subsp. canovirens, also known as Evening Primrose, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Onagraceae family. It is rich in essential fatty acids, particularly gamma-linolenic acid (GLA), which has been shown to have anti-inflammatory and medicinal properties. The health benefits of Oenothera strigosa subsp. canovirens include alleviating symptoms of menopause, eczema, and rheumatoid arthritis, as well as supporting heart health and immune function. Herbal preparations of Evening Primrose can be made into capsules, oil, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
